title: Walls and Gates
problem_statement: Fill each empty room with the distance to its nearest gate in a grid with walls, gates, and empty rooms.

examples.explanation: Distances propagate outward from gates to nearest reachable empty rooms.

intuition: Use multi-source BFS from all gates simultaneously to compute minimum distance to each room.

approaches.name: Multi-source BFS from gates
approaches.description: Enqueue all gate positions first and expand outward, setting distance only once for each empty room.
approaches.why_not: Running BFS from every room separately would be much less efficient.

interview_qa.a: Because gates are the sources of minimum distances for adjacent rooms.
It denotes an empty room that has not yet been reached by a gate.
